tinder.name: Hannah K.
tinder.text: Good app with a solid user base. Some matches were great, others clearly hadn't read my profile. About what you'd expect from online dating.

tinder.name: Thomas S.
tinder.text: Nice app, but be prepared for patience. It took about 6 weeks before I found someone worth meeting. The quality is there if you stick with it.

tinder.name: Thomas H.
tinder.text: Best dating app I've used. The interface is clean, the matches are relevant, and I actually met real people. Had 4 great dates in 3 months.

tinder.name: Giovanni L.
tinder.text: I was skeptical about online dating but Tinder changed my mind completely. Met my partner within 5 weeks and we've been together for 12 months now. The matching algorithm really works!

tinder.name: Laura I.
tinder.text: Perfect for what I was looking for. The community is respectful and the features help you find exactly the type of person you want to meet.

bumble.name: Sarah A.
bumble.text: Customer support is non-existent. Had an issue with my account and couldn't get any help. The matching algorithm also seems random.

bumble.name: Giovanni N.
bumble.text: Great experience overall. The app is intuitive, matches were compatible, and customer support was responsive when I had an issue. 5/5 from me.

bumble.name: Yuki D.
bumble.text: After trying several dating apps, Bumble stood out. The quality of profiles is noticeably higher. I appreciated the verification features that made me feel safe.

bumble.name: Sofia Y.
bumble.text: I've been using Bumble for 5 months and have had consistently good dates. The safety features give me confidence, and the matching is spot-on.
